_meta.description: DIGEST version mapping - includes essential enforcement sections
_meta.purpose: Rules, boundaries, gates, anti-patterns, sub-agent triggers, enforcement
_meta.excludes: Deep reference material, verbose examples, detailed procedures
_meta.token_budget: All DIGEST files combined must be <25k tokens

CLAUDE_DIGEST.md.description: Minimal router file (~2-3k chars) - loading strategy and essential triggers

CLAUDE_CORE_DIGEST.md.description: Essential enforcement rules (~10k chars) - non-negotiable constraints only
CLAUDE_CORE_DIGEST.md._removed_sections_note: auto_proceed_mode (10K, already in CLAUDE.md), sd_continuation_truth_table (7K, already in CLAUDE.md), sub_agent_config (2K, DB agent semantic triggers are reference), sub_agent_prompt_quality (reference), execution_philosophy (reference), governance_strategic_hierarchy (reference). ESCALATE TO FULL FILE WHEN: writing sub-agent prompts, debugging gate failures, understanding governance hierarchy, DB agent semantic triggering.

CLAUDE_LEAD_DIGEST.md.description: LEAD phase essentials (~3-4k chars) - approval gates and validation requirements

CLAUDE_PLAN_DIGEST.md.description: PLAN phase essentials (~4k chars) - PRD requirements and constraints
CLAUDE_PLAN_DIGEST.md._removed_sections_note: handoff_quality_gates (8.6K, gates run in code not from agent reading MD — reference only), mandatory_phase_transitions_plan (duplicate of CORE_DIGEST). ESCALATE TO FULL FILE WHEN: debugging gate failures, understanding specific gate scoring.

CLAUDE_EXEC_DIGEST.md.description: EXEC phase essentials (~8k chars) - implementation requirements and constraints
CLAUDE_EXEC_DIGEST.md._removed_sections_note: exec_retrospective_anti_patterns (reference, escalate for retro writing), mandatory_phase_transitions_exec (duplicate of CORE), migration_execution_delegation (duplicate of CORE). ESCALATE TO FULL FILE WHEN: writing retrospectives, debugging migration failures.
